calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-21-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of Two Minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Brenda Fields, #7235.
Petitioner Teresa Castro Hidalgo was present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the minors, who were not present at today's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to: Franc Eduard Castro Hidalgo and Emmanuel Castro Hidalgo.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-19-2008 Reset To Aug-21-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name - of a Minor / and Gender / Gender and issuance of new Birth Certificate.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Petitioner: --------, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for /and with/ the Minor: --------, was sworn and examined.

Lacks the Minor's Father consent and/ or proof of service or notice, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor: --------, is continued to _________, 2005 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner to submit proof of service to the Minor's father of the new hearing date or Order dispensing with notice.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: -----------------.

The Court further orders the gender of --------------- is changed from Male to Female / to Male.
